title: Agent Disagreement Record
description: Captures divergent findings between perspective agents in the challenge layer

disagreement_id.description: Unique identifier for this disagreement record (e.g., disag_001)

topic.description: What the disagreement is about (e.g., rent_growth_assumption)

base_assumption.description: The orchestrator's original assumption being challenged

positions.description: Positions held by each perspective agent

position.description: The agent's stated position on the topic

evidence.description: Supporting evidence or data cited by the agent

irr_sensitivity.description: IRR impact in basis points at different assumption values

resolution.description: The challenge layer's resolution of the disagreement

recommendation.description: The resolved position or recommended assumption

rationale.description: Explanation of how the resolution was reached

confidence.description: Challenge layer's confidence in the resolution (0.0-1.0)

reversal_trigger.description: Condition that would invalidate this resolution (references a trigger_id)

resolution_method.description: Method used to resolve the disagreement

disagreement_aggregation.title: Disagreement Aggregation
disagreement_aggregation.description: Deal-level summary of all agent disagreements and the challenge layer verdict

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the aggregation was produced

orchestrator_verdict.description: Original verdict from the orchestrator before challenge layer

challenge_layer_verdict.description: Final verdict after the challenge layer review

disagreements.description: All disagreement records captured for this deal

agreement_map.description: Topics where all agents agreed, keyed by topic name

reversal_triggers.description: Active reversal trigger IDs that could flip the challenge layer verdict
